import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_tokens(line1)

let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match find_index(nums, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
